summary: Backoff misconfiguration causes retry storm against object storage
description: A brief object storage blip triggered a much longer self-inflicted outage: hundreds of restores retrying in near lockstep against src/restore/fetcher.ts overwhelmed storage well after the original blip cleared.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: withRetry in src/util/backoff.ts has jitter enabled by default, but a batch job that kicks off many restores at once was passing jitter false to make retry timing predictable for its own logging. That's what synchronized the retries.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Removed the jitter override in the batch job, retries now spread naturally and storage recovered within minutes of the change. Resolving. We should consider making jitter non-optional.
